## Context

**What command did you run?**
<!-- e.g., terrain analyze, terrain impact --base main -->

**What kind of project?**
<!-- e.g., JS/TS monorepo with Jest, Go microservice, Python ML pipeline -->

**Approximate repo size:**
<!-- e.g., ~200 test files, ~50k LOC -->

## Your experience

**What was useful?**
<!-- What surprised you, what was actionable, what saved you time? -->

**What was confusing or missing?**
<!-- What didn't make sense, what did you expect to see but didn't? -->

**What would make you use this regularly?**
<!-- What's the gap between "interesting" and "part of my workflow"? -->

## Anything else?
<!-- Screenshots, report output, error messages — all helpful -->
